texto: ...It's who you are. You're like a hummingbird, defying reality, a beautiful mystery, spreading your sweetness to all the needy flowers. Well, I'm no pretty garden blossom and I don't need your brand of sugar.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Karin Kallmaker: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “...It's who you are. frase_original: ...It's who you are. You're like a hummingbird, defying reality, a beautiful mystery, spreading your sweetness to all the needy flowers. Well, I'm no pretty garden blossom and I don't need your brand of sugar.
